content.text: I'll read both files to understand the current RBRN structure and the RBSRV exemplar pattern.

1→= Recipe Bottle Service Configuration Regime Specification
     2→:toc:
     3→:toc-title: Table of Contents
     4→
     5→// Begin Mapping Section
     6→// tag::mapping-section[]
     7→
     8→// Category declarations:
     9→// at_ prefix: Architectural Term (core system components)
    10→// st_ prefix: Support Term (infrastructure and technical concepts)
    11→
    12→// Variant patterns:
    13→//   _s: plural form
    14→//   _p: possessive form
    15→//   _ed: past tense (verbs)
    16→//   _ing: progressive form (verbs)
    17→
    18→// Domain declaration: term_<canonical_term>
    19→
    20→:at_bottle_service:          <<term_bottle_service,Bottle Service>>
    21→:at_bottle_container:        <<term_bottle_container,Bottle Container>>
    22→:at_bottle_container_s:      <<term_bottle_container,Bottle Containers>>
    23→:at_bottle_image:            <<term_bottle_image,Bottle Image>>
    24→:at_sentry_container:        <<term_sentry_container,Sentry Container>>
    25→:at_sentry_image:            <<term_sentry_image,Sentry Image>>
    26→:at_nameplate:               <<term_nameplate,Nameplate>>
    27→:at_nameplate_s:             <<term_nameplate,Nameplates>>
    28→:at_moniker:                 <<term_moniker,Moniker>>
    29→:at_workstation:             <<term_workstation,Workstation>>
    30→:at_workstation_p:           <<term_workstation,Workstation's>>
    31→:at_user:                    <<term_user,User>>
    32→:at_enclave_network:         <<term_enclave_network,Enclave Network>>
    33→:at_transit_network:         <<term_transit_network,Transit Network>>
    34→
    35→:st_volume_mount:            <<term_volume_mount,Volume Mount>>
    36→:st_volume_mount_s:          <<term_volume_mount,Volume Mounts>>
    37→:st_port_map:                <<term_port_map,Port Map>>
    38→
    39→// Configuration Regime Type mappings
    40→:crg_atom_string:            <<crg_atom_string,String>>
    41→:crg_atom_xname:             <<crg_atom_xname,XName>>
    42→:crg_atom_fqin:              <<crg_atom_fqin,FQIN>>
    43→:crg_atom_decimal:           <<crg_atom_decimal,Decimal>>
    44→:crg_atom_ipv4:              <<crg_atom_ipv4,IPv4>>
    45→:crg_atom_cidr:              <<crg_atom_cidr,CIDR>>
    46→:crg_atom_domain:            <<crg_atom_domain,Domain>>
    47→:crg_atom_port:              <<crg_atom_port,Port>>
    48→:crg_list_cidr:              <<crg_list_cidr,CIDRList>>
    49→:crg_list_domain:            <<crg_list_domain,DomainList>>
    50→
    51→// end::mapping-section[]
    52→
    53→== Overview
    54→
    55→This Configuration Regime defines requirements for
    56→{at_bottle_service}
    57→deployment, specifying how
    58→{at_nameplate_s}
    59→configure container deployment and network security settings.
    60→
    61→== Feature Groups
    62→
    63→=== Core Service Identity
    64→
    65→[cols="1,1,3"]
    66→|===
    67→|Assignment Variable |Attribute |Details
    68→
    69→.4+|**`RBRN_MONIKER`**
    70→|Purpose|
    71→Unique moniker for
    72→{at_bottle_service}
    73→instance
    74→|Type|
    75→{crg_atom_xname}:
    76→2-12 characters
    77→|Required|
    78→Yes
    79→|Constraints|
    80→.4+|**`RBRN_DESCRIPTION`**
    81→|Purpose|
    82→Human-readable description of service purpose
    83→|Type|
    84→{crg_atom_string}:
    85→0-120 characters
    86→|Required|
    87→No
    88→|Constraints|
    89→
    90→.4+|**`RBRN_RUNTIME`**
    91→|Purpose|
    92→Container runtime to use for service deployment
    93→|Type|
    94→{crg_atom_string}:
    95→"docker" or "podman"
    96→|Required|
    97→Yes
    98→|Constraints|
    99→Must be either "docker" or "podman"
   100→|===
   101→
   102→=== Ark Reference Configuration
   103→
   104→Ark references identify which vessel consecration to deploy.
   105→At runtime, these resolve against `RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY` to form complete image paths.
   106→
   107→[cols="1,1,3"]
   108→|===
   109→|Assignment Variable |Attribute |Details
   110→
   111→.4+|**`RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL`**
   112→|Purpose|
   113→Vessel identifier for
   114→{at_sentry_image}
   115→|Type|
   116→{crg_atom_fqin}:
   117→1-128 characters
   118→|Required|
   119→Yes
   120→|Constraints|
   121→
   122→.4+|**`RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION`**
   123→|Purpose|
   124→Consecration timestamp for
   125→{at_sentry_image}
   126→|Type|
   127→{crg_atom_fqin}:
   128→1-128 characters
   129→|Required|
   130→Yes
   131→|Constraints|
   132→
   133→.4+|**`RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL`**
   134→|Purpose|
   135→Vessel identifier for
   136→{at_bottle_image}
   137→|Type|
   138→{crg_atom_fqin}:
   139→1-128 characters
   140→|Required|
   141→Yes
   142→|Constraints|
   143→
   144→.4+|**`RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION`**
   145→|Purpose|
   146→Consecration timestamp for
   147→{at_bottle_image}
   148→|Type|
   149→{crg_atom_fqin}:
   150→1-128 characters
   151→|Required|
   152→Yes
   153→|Constraints|
   154→|===
   155→
   156→=== Entry Service Configuration
   157→
   158→[cols="1,1,3"]
   159→|===
   160→|Assignment Variable |Attribute |Details
   161→
   162→.4+|**`RBRN_ENTRY_MODE`**
   163→|Purpose|
   164→Mode for user-initiated entry functionality
   165→|Type|
   166→{crg_atom_string}: "disabled" or "enabled"
   167→|Required|
   168→Yes
   169→|Constraints|
   170→
   171→.4+|**`RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION`**
   172→|Purpose|
   173→External port exposed on
   174→{at_transit_network}
   175→for user entry
   176→|Type|
   177→{crg_atom_port}
   178→|Required|
   179→When ENTRY_MODE=enabled
   180→|Constraints|
   181→Must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
   182→
   183→.4+|**`RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE`**
   184→|Purpose|
   185→Port used between
   186→{at_sentry_container}
   187→and
   188→{at_bottle_container}
   189→for entry traffic
   190→|Type|
   191→{crg_atom_port}
   192→|Required|
   193→When ENTRY_MODE=enabled
   194→|Constraints|
   195→Must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
   196→|===
   197→
   198→=== {at_enclave_network} Configuration 
   199→
   200→[cols="1,1,3"]
   201→|===
   202→|Assignment Variable |Attribute |Details
   203→
   204→.4+|**`RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP`**
   205→|Purpose|
   206→Base IPv4 address that defines the enclave network range
   207→|Type|
   208→{crg_atom_ipv4}
   209→|Required|
   210→Yes
   211→|Constraints|
   212→
   213→.4+|**`RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK`**
   214→|Purpose|
   215→Network mask width for the enclave network addressing
   216→|Type|
   217→{crg_atom_decimal}:
   218→8-30
   219→|Required|
   220→Yes
   221→|Constraints|
   222→
   223→.4+|**`RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP`**
   224→|Purpose|
   225→IP address assigned to the
   226→{at_sentry_container}
   227→for traffic mediation
   228→|Type|
   229→{crg_atom_ipv4}
   230→|Required|
   231→Yes
   232→|Constraints|
   233→
   234→.4+|**`RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP`**
   235→|Purpose|
   236→IP address assigned to the
   237→{at_bottle_container}
   238→|Type|
   239→{crg_atom_ipv4}
   240→|Required|
   241→Yes
   242→|Constraints|
   243→|===
   244→
   245→=== Uplink Configuration
   246→
   247→[cols="1,1,3"]
   248→|===
   249→|Assignment Variable |Attribute |Details
   250→
   251→.4+|**`RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN`**
   252→|Purpose|
   253→Minimum port number for bottle-initiated outbound connections
   254→|Type|
   255→{crg_atom_port}
   256→|Required|
   257→Yes
   258→|Constraints|
   259→Must be greater than any Entry port
   260→
   261→.4+|**`RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE`**
   262→|Purpose|
   263→DNS resolution mode for bottle-initiated requests
   264→|Type|
   265→{crg_atom_string}: "disabled", "global", or "allowlist"
   266→|Required|
   267→Yes
   268→|Constraints|
   269→
   270→.4+|**`RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE`**
   271→|Purpose|
   272→IP access mode for bottle-initiated connections
   273→|Type|
   274→{crg_atom_string}: "disabled", "global", or "allowlist"
   275→|Required|
   276→Yes
   277→|Constraints|
   278→
   279→.4+|**`RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS`**
   280→|Purpose|
   281→CIDR ranges for allowed bottle-initiated outbound traffic
   282→|Type|
   283→{crg_list_cidr}
   284→|Required|
   285→When UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE=allowlist
   286→|Constraints|
   287→
   288→.4+|**`RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS`**
   289→|Purpose|
   290→Domain names allowed for bottle-initiated DNS resolution
   291→|Type|
   292→{crg_list_domain}
   293→|Required|
   294→When UPLINK_DNS_MODE=allowlist
   295→|Constraints|
   296→|===
   297→
   298→=== {st_volume_mount} Configuration
   299→
   300→[cols="1,1,3"]
   301→|===
   302→|Assignment Variable |Attribute |Details
   303→
   304→.4+|**`RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS`**
   305→|Purpose|
   306→Podman volume mount arguments for
   307→{at_bottle_container}
   308→|Type|
   309→{crg_atom_string}:
   310→0-240 characters
   311→|Required|
   312→No
   313→|Constraints|
   314→|===
   315→
   316→== Core Term Definitions
   317→
   318→[[term_bottle_service]]
   319→{at_bottle_service}::
   320→A complete service instance consisting of one 
   321→{at_bottle_container} 
   322→and one 
   323→{at_sentry_container}, 
   324→working together to provide secure functionality.
   325→
   326→[[term_bottle_container]]
   327→{at_bottle_container}::
   328→A container that runs the actual service functionality, connected only to the 
   329→{at_enclave_network} 
   330→and configured with specific 
   331→{st_volume_mount_s}.
   332→
   333→[[term_bottle_image]]
   334→{at_bottle_image}::
   335→A container image that contains the service functionality intended to run within a 
   336→{at_bottle_container}.
   337→
   338→[[term_sentry_container]]
   339→{at_sentry_container}::
   340→A privileged container that enforces network security policies for a 
   341→{at_bottle_service}, 
   342→controlling all network traffic and providing DNS services.
   343→
   344→[[term_sentry_image]]
   345→{at_sentry_image}::
   346→A container image that contains the security enforcement functionality for a 
   347→{at_sentry_container}.
   348→
   349→[[term_nameplate]]
   350→{at_nameplate}::
   351→A configuration file that defines all aspects of a 
   352→{at_bottle_service},
   353→including its images, network settings, and security policies.
   354→
   355→[[term_moniker]]
   356→{at_moniker}::
   357→A unique identifier that distinguishes each 
   358→{at_bottle_service} 
   359→instance usable on a given
   360→{at_workstation}.
   361→
   362→[[term_workstation]]
   363→{at_workstation}::
   364→The local computing environment where the 
   365→{at_user} 
   366→runs containerized services.
   367→
   368→[[term_transit_network]]
   369→{at_transit_network}::
   370→The network interface that connects a 
   371→{at_sentry_container} 
   372→to the
   373→{at_workstation_p}
   374→network resources, handling both user-initiated entry traffic
   375→(in lower port space)
   376→and bottle-initiated uplink traffic
   377→(in higher port space).
   378→
   379→[[term_enclave_network]]
   380→{at_enclave_network}::
   381→An isolated network connecting a 
   382→{at_bottle_container} 
   383→to its 
   384→{at_sentry_container}.
   385→
   386→[[term_port_map]]
   387→{st_port_map}::
   388→A specification of how network ports should be exposed and mapped between 
   389→{at_sentry_container} 
   390→and 
   391→{at_bottle_container}.
   392→
   393→[[term_volume_mount]]
   394→{st_volume_mount}::
   395→A configuration that allows 
   396→{at_bottle_container_s} 
   397→to access specified portions of the host filesystem.
   398→
   399→
   400→

1→//axhrb_regime
     2→{rbrv_regime}
     3→
     4→This regime specifies variables that define container image vessel configurations within the Recipe Bottle system.
     5→Each {rbrv_regime} instance represents a distinct container image definition with its own build parameters and runtime characteristics.
     6→RBRV assignment files are found in `rbev-vessels/*/rbrv.env` and control the build process for specific container image types.
     7→
     8→//axhrv_variable
     9→{rbrv_sigil}
    10→
    11→Unique identifier for the vessel type.
    12→Must form valid directory name and moniker basis.
    13→
    14→//axhrv_variable
    15→{rbrv_description}
    16→
    17→Human-readable documentation of the vessel's purpose, role, and key characteristics.
    18→Used for identification in logs, messages, and documentation contexts.
    19→
    20→//axhrv_variable
    21→{rbrv_vessel_mode}
    22→
    23→Selects which variable group is active for this vessel.
    24→
    25→//axhrgb_group
    26→{rbrv_group_binding}
    27→
    28→//axhrgc_gate
    29→{rbrv_vessel_mode} {rbrv_vessel_mode_bind}
    30→
    31→Variables in this group apply only when {rbrv_vessel_mode} is {rbrv_vessel_mode_bind}.
    32→
    33→//axhrgv_variable
    34→{rbrv_bind_image}
    35→
    36→Upstream container image reference used directly without modification.
    37→
    38→//axhrgb_group
    39→{rbrv_group_conjuring}
    40→
    41→//axhrgc_gate
    42→{rbrv_vessel_mode} {rbrv_vessel_mode_conjure}
    43→
    44→Variables in this group apply only when {rbrv_vessel_mode} is {rbrv_vessel_mode_conjure}.
    45→
    46→//axhrgv_variable
    47→{rbrv_conjure_dockerfile}
    48→
    49→Path to the Dockerfile used during the build process.
    50→Typically `${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/Dockerfile`.
    51→
    52→//axhrgv_variable
    53→{rbrv_conjure_bldcontext}
    54→
    55→Build context directory passed to the container build engine.
    56→Typically `${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${RBRV_SIGIL}`.
    57→
    58→//axhrgv_variable
    59→{rbrv_conjure_platforms}
    60→
    61→Target platform architectures for multi-platform builds.
    62→Example: `linux/amd64 linux/arm64 linux/arm/v7`.
    63→
    64→//axhrgv_variable
    65→{rbrv_conjure_binfmt_policy}
    66→
    67→QEMU binary format policy for multi-platform builds.
    68→Controls cross-architecture binary format emulation during build.
    69→

content.text: Now I'll completely rewrite RBRN-RegimeNameplate.adoc following the RBSRV exemplar pattern exactly.

content.content: The file /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBRN-RegimeNameplate.adoc has been overwritten successfully.

content.text:
Perfect! I've completely rewritten `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBRN-RegimeNameplate.adoc` to follow the RBSRV exemplar pattern exactly. 

## Key changes made:

1. **Removed all standalone document elements:**
   - AsciiDoc title (`= Recipe Bottle...`)
   - `:toc:` directives
   - Entire mapping section (lines 1-51)
   - All section headers (`==`, `===`)
   - All tables (`[cols]`)
   - Core Term Definitions section (lines 316-400)
   - All `{at_*}` and `{crg_*}` attribute references

2. **Replaced with axhr hierarchy markers:**
   - `//axhrb_regime` - regime block marker
   - `//axhrv_variable` - top-level variable markers
   - `//axhrgb_group` - group block markers
   - `//axhrgc_gate` - conditional gate markers
   - `//axhrgv_variable` - group variable markers

3. **Used only appropriate attribute references:**
   - `{rbrn_*}` attributes throughout
   - `{rbst_*}` attribute not needed in this file

4. **Followed exact RBSRV formatting:**
   - Marker line followed immediately by attribute reference (no blank line between)
   - Blank line, then prose description
   - Consistent structure throughout

The file is now ready to be included by RBAGS-AdminGoogleSpec.adoc as a subdocument, with all anchors and mapping handled by the parent document.
